Off Calendar Oct-02-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiffs/Cross-Defendants' Motion To Strike

APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Michael Zitani (michaelz@thclinic.org) and Raquel Fox (raquel@thclinic.org) for Plaintiffs. Matthew Kracht (mkracht@heathandyuen.com) for Defendant.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Cross-Defendants' "motion to strike unauthorized cross-complaint" is granted. Earlier this year, I granted requests to file two cross-complaints in this case. Instead, cross-complainants filed one cross-complaint that supposedly "simply merges together the two authorized filings." (Opp. 5:11-13.) However, cross-defendants point out - and cross-complainants' opposition does not dispute - that the "merged" cross-complaint contains "factual allegations never presented to the court." (Memo. 3:15-17.)

Order signed.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
